title: lundellianthus jaliscensis
intro: Lundellianthus jaliscensis, also known as Lundell's desert marigold, is a flowering plant species in the family Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds due to its expectorant properties. The health benefits of Lundellianthus jaliscensis include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of arthritis and protect against cell damage. Herbal preparations of Lundellianthus jaliscensis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and effects.
